title: Update domain to securelytime.com

requirements.text: Update all references to the application domain across the project to use 'securelytime.com', including any configuration files, HTML meta tags, canonical URLs, site verification files, and any hardcoded domain strings in frontend or backend code.
acceptanceCriteria: All domain references in the codebase point to securelytime.com
The index.html or any HTML meta/canonical tags reference securelytime.com if applicable
No references to any previous domain remain in configuration or source files

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not alter core application logic unrelated to the domain change
nonGoals: DNS configuration or hosting provider setup
